title: Visual Name Tags
description: Gives name tags different textures based on their name.
body:
## Summary
Gives name tags different textures based on their name. Such as: 
- Dinnerbone
- Grumm
- Toast
- Johnny
- jeb_

 Aditional modded name tag easter eggs may be added in the future
